_comment: Copy into <project>/.logscope/config.json and edit. Full reference: doc/CONFIG.md. Keys starting with _ are comments.

sources._comment: Optional second input on the same timeline — read-only file tail.
sources.name: server

_comment_parsers: Omit for auto (all built-in presets). See doc/CONFIG.md for the preset table, or use custom regex `rules`.
_comment_commands: Aliases for `logscope run <name>`. A debug-probe flasher (openocd/jlink/probe-rs) belongs here — it never touches the UART, so the port stays attached and the reset banner lands in the timeline. {device}/{baud} substitute from the live source when detachPort is set; detachPort is only for tools that flash over the UART itself (esptool, mcumgr).

flash.cmd: openocd -f board/my_board.cfg -c 'program build/app.elf verify reset exit'

_comment_flash: Native serial flashing, for UART bootloaders you'd otherwise drive by hand: `logscope flash <image>` runs this script (contract in .logscope/scripts/README.md). Most boards don't need this — delete the key and use a commands alias instead.
